nasb.text: And they were unable to catch Him in a saying in the presence of the people; and being amazed at His answer, they became silent.

esv.text: And they were not able in the presence of the people to catch him in what he said, but marveling at his answer they became silent.

cnv.text: 他們在群眾面前，不能抓住耶穌的把柄，又希奇他的回答，就沉默下來。

ccb.text: 耶稣的回答令他们惊奇，他们无法当众找到把柄，只好闭口不言。

csbs.text: 他们在民众面前抓不到耶稣的话柄，又对他的答复感到惊奇，就哑口无言了。
